name: Fruitcake Elemental
oracleText: Fruitcake Elemental is indestructible. At the end of your turn, Fruitcake Elemental deals 7 damage to you. {3}: Target player gains control of Fruitcake Elemental.

name: Gifts Given
oracleText: Search target opponent's library for four cards with different names and reveal them. That player chooses two of those cards. Put the chosen cards into the player's graveyard and the rest into your hand. Then that player shuffles their library.

name: Evil Presents
oracleText: Put a creature card from your hand into play under target opponent's control. That creature attacks each turn if able . . . and always attacks its controller.

name: Season's Beatings
oracleText: Family gathering — Each creature target player controls deals damage equal to its power to another random creature that player controls.

name: Snow Mercy
oracleText: Whenever a creature deals damage to you, put a globe counter on it. {T}, {Q}, {T}, {Q}, {T}: Tap all creatures with globe counters on them.

name: Yule Ooze
oracleText: At the beginning of your upkeep, destroy another nonland permanent chosen at random, then put a number of +1/+1 counters on Yule Ooze equal to that permanent's converted mana cost. {R}{G}, Eat some food: Regenerate Yule Ooze.

name: Naughty // Nice
oracleText: Naughty: Search another target player's library for a card and put that card into your hand. Then shuffle that player's library. // Nice: Search your library for a card and put it into another target player's hand. Then shuffle your library.

name: Stocking Tiger
oracleText: Stocking Tiger enters with a sealed Magic booster pack under it. When Stocking Tiger deals combat damage to a player, unwrap the booster pack and put it into your hand.

name: Mishra's Toy Workshop
oracleText: {T}: Add {C}{C}{C}. Spend this mana only on spells and abilities that put tokens onto the battlefield. Use toys to represent the tokens.

name: Goblin Sleigh Ride
oracleText: Target creature you control climbs into Goblin Sleigh Ride. You slide them on their merry way. If the creature stayed on, it deals damage equal to its toughness to each other creature touched during the slide.

name: Thopter Pie Network
oracleText: At the beginning of your upkeep, if you're eating, create a 1/1 colorless Thopter artifact creature token with flying. Use food to represent the token. Whenever a creature token you control dies, if it's represented by food, eat it.

name: Some Disassembly Required
oracleText: {B}, Sacrifice a creature: Distribute the sacrificed creature's keyword abilities among any number of other target creatures until end of turn. If it's December, you gain 1 life for each of those keywords.

name: Bog Humbugs
oracleText: Flying Whenever Bog Humbugs deals combat damage, hum that many notes of a festive song. If you can, put a +1/+1 counter on Bog Humbugs.

name: Decorated Knight // Present Arms
actualAnalyzerRoles: card_draw, combat_body, combat_support, direct_draw, draw, repeatable_advantage, repeatable_draw
oracleText: Decorated Knight: Whenever Decorated Knight attacks, draw a card from your original deck if it's outside the game. // Present Arms: Exchange your library with another deck you own from outside the game. Shuffle your library.

name: Topdeck the Halls
oracleText: Decorated cards in your hand have miracle {S}. (Decorated cards include premiums, promos, and cards with alternate frames or art.) At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control twelve or more decorated permanents, you win the game.

name: Last-Minute Chopping
oracleText: Ask target opponent if they remembered to get you a present. If they say yes, they put a card they own from outside the game into your hand. Otherwise, you gain control of target permanent they control.

name: Treasure
oracleText: {T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.

name: Chaos Wrap
oracleText: The owner of target permanent shuffles it into their library. Then they may look at the top card of their library and may wrap it. If it's a permanent card, they may put it onto the battlefield. Otherwise, they may put it onto the battlefield face down as a 4/4 red Present creature. (To wrap a card, put it inside lots of sleeves. If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a sleeve from it instead.)

name: Seasonal Sequels
oracleText: Pitch the titles of up to X holiday-themed sequels to target spell. Copy that spell for each title pitched, except the copy has that name. You may choose new targets for the copies. (Simply adding numbers isn't festive enough.)

name: Eggnogger's 'Stache
oracleText: Lands you control have "{T}: Refill your mug with a festive drink." (If you don't have a mug, go grab a mug! It's the holidays!) At the beginning of combat on your turn, if you have a drink 'stache, put two +1/+1 counters on each creature you control.

name: Cheer
oracleText: Lifelink, haste When this creature enters, create two tokens that are copies of target token. Evoke—Celebrate an opponent. (To celebrate an opponent, give them a gift, toast to them, or even just tell them you're grateful to be playing Magic together.)
